world.title: Africa’s Endangered Wild Dogs Gain Ground Through Conservation Collaboration
world.description: Johannesburg, March 2026 - African wild dogs (Lycaon pictus), among Africa’s most endangered carnivores, are thriving in parts of the Waterberg Biosphere thanks to innovative conservation programmes and coordinated efforts between reserves and wildlife organisations.

science.title: Perseverance Rover Finds Ruby And Sapphire-Like Gems On Mars
science.description: Scientists were 'surprised' when the NASA Perseverance Rover discovered minerals that form rubies and sapphires embedded in pebbles on Mars.

science.title: Losing the Y chromosome with age may raise disease risk in men

science.title: Mining a methane-degrading bioreactor for protein rubies
science.description: Scientists have found a new type of iron-storing protein in a mixture of microbes containing methane-degraders. This discovery underscores the importance of characterizing proteins from microbes that cannot be isolated, thereby enabling the discovery of new enzymes for future applications. The paper is published in the journal Communications Biology.

ai.title: Naidu's Natural Gas Initiative in Andhra Pradesh
ai.description: Andhra Pradesh CM N Chandrababu Naidu has directed officials to implement a plan for supplying piped natural gas to households, addressing LPG supply issues. Emphasizing alternative fuels, Naidu aims for state-wide PNG coverage, promotes electric cooking, and calls for a 'Natural Gas Policy'. Technological advancements using AI were also highlighted.
